ddls:
CREATE TABLE "territories" (
  "territory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each territory */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the territory, including the country it belongs to */,
  "flag_image" TEXT /* File path to the flag image of the territory */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the territory in square kilometers */,
  "population_2002" INTEGER /* Estimated population of the territory on July 1, 2002 */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the territory (people per square kilometer) */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the territory */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the territory belongs to */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the territory is located */,
  "population_growth_rate" REAL /* Annual population growth rate */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product (GDP) of the territory */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate of the territory */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the territory's capital city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the territory's capital city */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the territory data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("territory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_territories_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_territories_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Current population of the country */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Total area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Official currency of the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language(s) of the country */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the country data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "territory_data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of the territory data */,
  "territory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the territory the data version belongs to */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the data version was created */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data version */,
  "data_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file for this version */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., population, economic, environmental) */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the data version */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the data version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_territory_data_versions_territory_id FOREIGN KEY ("territory_id") REFERENCES territories ("territory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "country_access" TEXT /* Country access permissions (e.g., Finland, Denmark, All) */,
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user role table */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_user_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_country_access FOREIGN KEY ("country_access") REFERENCES countries ("country_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)
